title: 🏠 Presence Detection
subtitle: Track who is home by scanning the network
add_hint: Scan your network to discover devices. Select your phone or laptop, enter a name, and click Add.
no_devices_found: No devices found. Make sure devices are connected to the same network.
select_device: Select one or more devices that belong to this person
no_users: No one tracked yet. Scan the network and add people below.
err_required: User ID and Name are required
qr_hint: Show this QR to the person. They scan it with their phone camera.
push_reset_hint: Regenerate VAPID keys and clear all subscriptions. Users must re-subscribe.
push_reset_ok: Keys regenerated. Users must re-subscribe from their phones.
push_reset_confirm: This will delete all push subscriptions. Users will need to re-subscribe. Continue?
